request.description: PUBLIC – no Authorization header needed.
PUBLIC. Saves token to CITIZEN_TOKEN.
PUBLIC. Saves token to ADMIN_TOKEN.
PUBLIC. Saves token to SUPERVISOR_TOKEN.
PUBLIC. Saves token to OFFICER_TOKEN.
PUBLIC – used by newly created staff accounts before first login.
Any authenticated user. Saves userId to OFFICER_ID when called with OFFICER_TOKEN.
ADMIN or DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Role values: DEPT_SUPERVISOR, FIELD_OFFICER, PWE, COMPLIANCE.
ADMIN sees all users. DEPT_SUPERVISOR sees own department only.
ADMIN only. Status values: Active, Inactive, Suspended.
ADMIN or COMPLIANCE_OFFICER.
CITIZEN role required. Creates citizen profile after IAM registration.
CITIZEN (own profile). Mutable fields only — email/gender/dob/nationalId cannot be changed.
ADMIN or DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Status codes: A (Active), V (Verified), F (Flagged).
CITIZEN (own). multipart/form-data. Max 5 docs, 2MB each. Types: pdf/jpg/jpeg/png.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Status: V (Verified) or R (Rejected).
ADMIN only.
Replace sample-file.pdf with the filename from filePath field.
CITIZEN. Saves permitId to PERMIT_ID.
CITIZEN sees own permits. Staff sees all. Saves first permitId to PERMIT_ID.
CITIZEN. multipart/form-data. Do NOT add Content-Type header.
Saves first documentId to DOCUMENT_ID.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR or ADMIN.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR, COMPLIANCE, ADMIN.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR or ADMIN. Saves inspectionId to INSPECTION_ID.
FIELD_OFFICER. Saves first inspectionId to INSPECTION_ID.

formdata.value: Premises clean. Fire extinguisher present. Exit clearly marked.

request.description: FIELD_OFFICER. multipart/form-data. outcome values: PASS, FAIL, NEEDS_REINSPECTION. Do NOT add Content-Type header.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR or ADMIN. decision: Approved or Rejected.
CITIZEN. Only for APPROVED permits.
CITIZEN. Category codes: WS (Water Supply), RD (Roads), SAN (Sanitation), etc.
CITIZEN. Returns own grievances only.
CITIZEN, FIELD_OFFICER, DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Response varies by role.
CITIZEN. Only allowed when grievance status is Open.
CITIZEN. No request body. Only when status is Resolved.
CITIZEN. Only when status is Resolved.
DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Optional query: ?status=O&escalationLevel=L2
DEPT_SUPERVISOR. fieldOfficerId must be a FIELD_OFFICER in the same department.
FIELD_OFFICER. Returns own assigned grievances only.
FIELD_OFFICER or DEPT_SUPERVISOR. Logs a new work action on the grievance.
FIELD_OFFICER. Status: O (Open) → IP (In Progress) → CM (Completed). CM sends grievance back to supervisor.
Any authenticated user. Optional: ?category=Certificate
CITIZEN. Saves requestId to SERVICE_REQUEST_ID.
ADMIN, DEPT_SUPERVISOR, COMPLIANCE, FIELD_OFFICER. Optional: ?status=Submitted
Any authenticated. CITIZEN can only view own requests.
CITIZEN (own), ADMIN, DEPT_SUPERVISOR.
ADMIN, DEPT_SUPERVISOR, FIELD_OFFICER. Status flow: Submitted → UnderReview → Approved/Rejected.
CITIZEN (own request). multipart/form-data. PDF/JPG/PNG only. Saves docSubmissionId to SR_DOC_ID.
ADMIN, DEPT_SUPERVISOR, FIELD_OFFICER. verificationStatus: Verified or Rejected.

item.name: Get Work Orders By Ward (Citizen – Public)

request.description: PWE, DEPT_SUPERVISOR, ADMIN. Saves workOrderId to WORK_ORDER_ID.
Only when status is Planned or OnHold.
Status flow: Planned → InProgress → Completed / OnHold / Cancelled.
Soft-delete. No request body needed.
COMPLIANCE, ADMIN, DEPT_SUPERVISOR.
Soft-delete (isDeleted = true). Milestones remain for audit.
